title: [Firtool] Separate command-line options and C-API options with template
body:
Fixes #6291

Basically, this PR did:

1. Make `FirtoolOptions` become a template struct, and the template parameter accepts the new added `Opt` or `OptStorage`. The former is for Firtool-lib, it's just a wrapper of `llvm::cl::opt`. The latter is for Firtool C-API, it's a wrapper of `llvm::cl::opt_storage`, and discard all command properties such as `llvm::cl::desc`, `llvm::cl::cat` except `llvm::cl::init` as the default value.

2. Make all `populate-` functions become template functions, so that these functions can accept both `FirtoolOptions<Opt>` and `FirtoolOptions<OptStorage>`.

3. Since all `populate-` functions are now template functions, we have to move these functions from `.cpp` to `.h` for template instantiations.
